case_title: DIGIOVANNI, LISA VS A & A QUALITY REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DIGIOVANNI, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT A & A QUALITY REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIGIOVANNI, LISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A & A QUALITY REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-15-1999, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-15-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-15-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO LISA DIGIOVANNI RETURNED TO SENDER;
